title: Get Body Time Series by Date
description: Retrieves a list of all user's bmi, body fat, or weight for a given period.

parameters.name: user-id
parameters.description: The encoded ID of the user. Use "-" (dash) for current logged-in user.

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: The body resource to be returned. Supported : bmi | fat | weight

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: The end date of the period specified in the format yyyy-MM-dd or today .

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: The range for which data will be returned. Supported: 1d | 7d | 30d | 1w | 1m | 3m | 6m | 1y | max

response_fields.name: body-<resource> : datetime
response_fields.description: The datetime which the resource was recorded.
